2026-04-22T03:38:42.3065502Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3066590Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3067039Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3067402Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3067698Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3067925Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3068080Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3068256Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3068424Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3068643Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3068845Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3069131Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-22T03:38:42.3069395Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

{"timestamp":"2026-04-22T03:39:39.508195622Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58474,\"title\":\"[ComputeLimit] Docs: Add key concepts and code examples for new Feature and VmFamily resource types\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/computelimit/Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit 598a6b2 (PR #57628) by `@azure-sdk` (co-authored by `@ArcturusZhang`, `@hebin-ms`, `@ajbhal`)\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #57628 added two new resource types to the 1.0.0 GA release of `Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit`:\\n- `ComputeLimitFeatureResource` / `ComputeLimitFeatureCollection` / `ComputeLimitFeatureData` — manage compute limit features with `Enable`/`Disable` operations per subscription and location\\n- `ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource` / `ComputeLimitVmFamilyCollection` / `ComputeLimitVmFamilyData` — enumerate and manage VM family quota limits per subscription and location\\n- New models: `ComputeLimitFeatureProperties`, `ComputeLimitVmFamilyProperties`, `ComputeLimitFeatureState`\\n- New REST operations in `FeaturesRestOperations` and `VmFamiliesRestOperations`\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **README Key Concepts section** is a generic stub — it does not describe any of the package\\u0026#39;s actual resource types (`ComputeLimitGuestSubscription`, `ComputeLimitSharedLimit`, `ComputeLimitFeature`, `ComputeLimitVmFamily`)\\n- **README Examples section** points only to generic SDK sample links; there are no package-specific code snippets showing how to enumerate shared limits, manage guest subscriptions, list features, or query VM families\\n- **No `tests/Samples/` directory** exists — there are no test-backed snippet files, so `Update-Snippets.ps1` has nothing to inject into the README\\n- The newly added `Disable` operation on `ComputeLimitFeatureResource` and the new `ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource` listing are entirely undocumented in the README\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File 1:** `sdk/computelimit/Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit/README.md` — **Edit**\\n\\nReplace the placeholder **Key concepts** section with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nThe `Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit` library provides the following resource types for managing compute quota limits across Azure subscriptions:\\n\\n| Resource type | Description |\\n|---|---|\\n| `ComputeLimitSharedLimitResource` | Represents a shared compute quota limit pool that a subscription exposes for other subscriptions to consume. |\\n| `ComputeLimitGuestSubscriptionResource` | Represents a guest subscription that has been granted access to consume the shared quota of a host subscription. |\\n| `ComputeLimitFeatureResource` | Represents a compute-limit feature (e.g. Shared Quota) that can be enabled or disabled for a subscription at a given location. |\\n| `ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource` | Represents a VM family entry, providing visibility into per-family quota details available at a given subscription and location. |\\n\\nAll resource collections are accessed through extension methods on `SubscriptionResource`, scoped to an `AzureLocation`.\\n```\\n\\nReplace the **Examples** section with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### List all VM families available in a location\\n\\n```\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\nSubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\nAzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\nComputeLimitVmFamilyCollection vmFamilies = subscription.GetComputeLimitVmFamilies(location);\\nawait foreach (ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource vmFamily in vmFamilies.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;VM Family: {vmFamily.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### List and enable a compute limit feature\\n\\n```\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\nSubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\nAzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\nComputeLimitFeatureCollection features = subscription.GetComputeLimitFeatures(location);\\nawait foreach (ComputeLimitFeatureResource feature in features.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Feature: {feature.Data.Name}, State: {feature.Data.Properties?.State}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Create a shared limit and add a guest subscription\\n\\n```\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\nSubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\nAzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n// Retrieve existing shared limits\\nComputeLimitSharedLimitCollection sharedLimits = subscription.GetComputeLimitSharedLimits(location);\\nawait foreach (ComputeLimitSharedLimitResource sharedLimit in sharedLimits.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Shared Limit: {sharedLimit.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n\\n// List guest subscriptions for this host\\nComputeLimitGuestSubscriptionCollection guestSubscriptions = subscription.GetComputeLimitGuestSubscriptions(location);\\nawait foreach (ComputeLimitGuestSubscriptionResource guest in guestSubscriptions.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Guest Subscription: {guest.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate the file `sdk/computelimit/Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit/tests/Samples/Sample1_ComputeLimit.cs` with:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System;\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager;\\nusing Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample1_ComputeLimit\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample compiles\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task ListVmFamilies()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ComputeLimit_ListVmFamilies\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            AzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n            ComputeLimitVmFamilyCollection vmFamilies = subscription.GetComputeLimitVmFamilies(location);\\n            await foreach (ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource vmFamily in vmFamilies.GetAllAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;VM Family: {vmFamily.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample compiles\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task EnableFeature()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ComputeLimit_EnableFeature\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            AzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n            ComputeLimitFeatureCollection features = subscription.GetComputeLimitFeatures(location);\\n            await foreach (ComputeLimitFeatureResource feature in features.GetAllAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Feature: {feature.Data.Name}, State: {feature.Data.Properties?.State}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Only verifying that the sample compiles\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task ManageSharedLimits()\\n        {\\n            #region Snippet:ComputeLimit_ManageSharedLimits\\n            ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            AzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n            // Retrieve existing shared limits\\n            ComputeLimitSharedLimitCollection sharedLimits = subscription.GetComputeLimitSharedLimits(location);\\n            await foreach (ComputeLimitSharedLimitResource sharedLimit in sharedLimits.GetAllAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Shared Limit: {sharedLimit.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n\\n            // List guest subscriptions for this host\\n            ComputeLimitGuestSubscriptionCollection guestSubscriptions = subscription.GetComputeLimitGuestSubscriptions(location);\\n            await foreach (ComputeLimitGuestSubscriptionResource guest in guestSubscriptions.GetAllAsync())\\n            {\\n                Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Guest Subscription: {guest.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n            }\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nThen add snippet placeholders in the README at the Examples section for each snippet name:\\n- `ComputeLimit_ListVmFamilies`\\n- `ComputeLimit_EnableFeature`\\n- `ComputeLimit_ManageSharedLimits`\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nThe README at `sdk/computelimit/Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit/README.md` currently has all required sections but {"timestamp":"2026-04-22T03:39:39.67491063Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58474,\"title\":\"[ComputeLimit] Docs: Add key concepts and code examples for new Feature and VmFamily resource types\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/computelimit/Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit 598a6b2 (PR #57628) by `@azure-sdk` (co-authored by `@ArcturusZhang`, `@hebin-ms`, `@ajbhal`)\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #57628 added two new resource types to the 1.0.0 GA release of `Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit`:\\n- `ComputeLimitFeatureResource` / `ComputeLimitFeatureCollection` / `ComputeLimitFeatureData` — manage compute limit features with `Enable`/`Disable` operations per subscription and location\\n- `ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource` / `ComputeLimitVmFamilyCollection` / `ComputeLimitVmFamilyData` — enumerate and manage VM family quota limits per subscription and location\\n- New models: `ComputeLimitFeatureProperties`, `ComputeLimitVmFamilyProperties`, `ComputeLimitFeatureState`\\n- New REST operations in `FeaturesRestOperations` and `VmFamiliesRestOperations`\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- **README Key Concepts section** is a generic stub — it does not describe any of the package\\u0026#39;s actual resource types (`ComputeLimitGuestSubscription`, `ComputeLimitSharedLimit`, `ComputeLimitFeature`, `ComputeLimitVmFamily`)\\n- **README Examples section** points only to generic SDK sample links; there are no package-specific code snippets showing how to enumerate shared limits, manage guest subscriptions, list features, or query VM families\\n- **No `tests/Samples/` directory** exists — there are no test-backed snippet files, so `Update-Snippets.ps1` has nothing to inject into the README\\n- The newly added `Disable` operation on `ComputeLimitFeatureResource` and the new `ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource` listing are entirely undocumented in the README\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above.\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File 1:** `sdk/computelimit/Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit/README.md` — **Edit**\\n\\nReplace the placeholder **Key concepts** section with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Key concepts\\n\\nThe `Azure.ResourceManager.ComputeLimit` library provides the following resource types for managing compute quota limits across Azure subscriptions:\\n\\n| Resource type | Description |\\n|---|---|\\n| `ComputeLimitSharedLimitResource` | Represents a shared compute quota limit pool that a subscription exposes for other subscriptions to consume. |\\n| `ComputeLimitGuestSubscriptionResource` | Represents a guest subscription that has been granted access to consume the shared quota of a host subscription. |\\n| `ComputeLimitFeatureResource` | Represents a compute-limit feature (e.g. Shared Quota) that can be enabled or disabled for a subscription at a given location. |\\n| `ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource` | Represents a VM family entry, providing visibility into per-family quota details available at a given subscription and location. |\\n\\nAll resource collections are accessed through extension methods on `SubscriptionResource`, scoped to an `AzureLocation`.\\n```\\n\\nReplace the **Examples** section with:\\n\\n```markdown\\n## Examples\\n\\n### List all VM families available in a location\\n\\n```\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\nSubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\nAzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\nComputeLimitVmFamilyCollection vmFamilies = subscription.GetComputeLimitVmFamilies(location);\\nawait foreach (ComputeLimitVmFamilyResource vmFamily in vmFamilies.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;VM Family: {vmFamily.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### List and enable a compute limit feature\\n\\n```\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\nSubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\nAzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\nComputeLimitFeatureCollection features = subscription.GetComputeLimitFeatures(location);\\nawait foreach (ComputeLimitFeatureResource feature in features.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Feature: {feature.Data.Name}, State: {feature.Data.Properties?.State}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Create a shared limit and add a guest subscription\\n\\n```\\nArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\nSubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\nAzureLocation location = AzureLocation.EastUS;\\n\\n// Retrieve existing shared limits\\nComputeLimitSharedLimitCollection sharedLimits = subscription.GetComputeLimitSharedLimits(location);\\nawait foreach (ComputeLimitSharedLimitResource sharedLimit in sharedLimits.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Shared Limit: {sharedLimit.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n\\n// List guest subscriptions for this host\\nComputeLimitGuestSubscriptionCollection guestSubscriptions = subscription.GetComputeLimitGuestSubscriptions(location);\\nawait foreach (ComputeLimitGuestSubscriptionResource guest in guestSubscriptions.GetAllAsync())\\n{\\n    Console.WriteLine($\\u0026#34;Guest Subscription: {guest.Data.Name}\\u0026#34;);\\n}\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\nCreate subscription.GetComputeLimitFeatures(location);\\n            await foreach (ComputeLimitFeatureResource feature in features.GetAllAsync())\\n            {\\n         ArmClient client = new ArmClient(new DefaultAzureCredential());\\n            SubscriptionResource subscription = await client.GetDefaultSubscriptionAsync();\\n            AzureLocation
